chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4398 of 2021 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.18164/2021 2.For hearing of main case. 07.02.2025 Mr.Qazi Umair Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R). Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the respondent Department states that the impugned demand notice shall be withdrawn forthwith, however, the Department is at liberty to issue fresh notice subject to law. In view hereof, the petitioner’s counsel states that the object of this petition has been served, hence it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
